nextBtn.note: Enabled when total pages > current page. Unique match: 1. Clicking updates URL to ?page=N.

prevBtn.note: Disabled on page 1 via HTML 'disabled' boolean attribute (disabled=''). Enabled from page 2 onward. Unique match: 1.

firstBtn.note: Disabled on page 1 via HTML 'disabled' boolean attribute. Enabled from page 2 onward. Unique match: 1.

lastBtn.note: Enabled when not already on last page. Unique match: 1.

pageInput.note: No page number input field found. Navigation is done via numbered page buttons or Next/Prev/First/Last buttons only.

pageIndicator.note: Active/current page button has aria-current='page' attribute. Also has disabled='' (pointer-events-none). On page 1: text='1', aria-current='page'. On page 2: text='2', aria-current='page'. Use .textContent() to get current page number.

totalCount.note: Displayed as: 'Tất cả danh sách : 589'. The inside the div contains the numeric total. Full parent locator: div.flex-1.text-sm.text-main. Stability=medium due to reliance on Vietnamese UI text 'Tất cả danh sách'.

disabledAttr.note: Disabled state uses HTML boolean attribute: disabled=''. NOT aria-disabled. Check via: getAttribute('disabled') !== null, OR Playwright isDisabled(). CSS visual cues: class includes 'disabled:text-gray-200' and 'disabled:border-[#9DA4AE]'. Same pattern applies to firstBtn when on page 1.

pageSizeSelect.note: Native <select> element with options: 10/trang, 20/trang, 50/trang, 100/trang. No data-testid or name attribute. Stability=medium due to CSS class dependency. The selected value controls items per page.

lastPageNumber.note: Last visible page number button (e.g. '59') is also present in DOM but is not labelled 'last page button' — use button[aria-label='Last page'] to navigate to last page. As of 2026-06-10: total 589 records, 59 pages (with 10/page default).

notes: Custom pagination component (not Ant Design / Material). All nav buttons use aria-label for semantic identification — high stability. Disabled state = HTML boolean 'disabled' attribute (NOT aria-disabled). Current page = aria-current='page' on the page number button. Total count displayed in Vietnamese: 'Tất cả danh sách : {N}'. Page size is a native <select> with no name/id attributes. No page number input exists.
